---
title: "Publications & Presentations"
echo: false
jupyter: python3
section-divs: false
keep-md: true
format: html
---

```{python}
import yaml
from IPython.display import display, Markdown, HTML
from scholarly import scholarly
from collections import defaultdict

def readable_list(_s):
    if len(_s) < 3:
        return ' and '.join(map(str, _s))
    *a, b = _s
    return f"{', '.join(map(str, a))}, and {b}"

def button(url, text, icon):
    icon_base = icon[:2]
    return f"""<a class="btn btn-outline-dark btn-sm" href="{url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
        <i class="{icon_base} {icon}" role='img' aria-label='{text}'></i>
        {text}
    </a>"""

# Function to fetch publications from Google Scholar
def fetch_publications(scholar_id):
    try:
        author = scholarly.fill(scholarly.search_author_id(scholar_id))
        return author.get('publications', [])
    except Exception as e:
        return [f"Error fetching publications: {e}"]

# Load publications from YAML
yaml_data = yaml.safe_load(open("papers.yaml"))
pub_strs = defaultdict(list)

# Fetch Google Scholar publications
scholar_id = "AebpXJgAAAAJ"  # Your Google Scholar ID
publications = fetch_publications(scholar_id)

# Create a lookup table for citation counts
citations_lookup = {pub['bib'].get('title', ''): pub.get('num_citations', "NA") for pub in publications}

for _, data in yaml_data.items():
    title_str = data["title"]
    authors = data.get("authors", ["me"])
    authors = [aut if aut != "me" else "<strong>Atika Syeda</strong>" for aut in authors]
    author_str = readable_list(authors)
    year_str = data["year"]

    buttons = []
    preprint = data.get("preprint")
    if preprint is not None:
        buttons.append(button(preprint, "Preprint", "bi-file-earmark-pdf"))

    github = data.get("github")
    if github is not None:
        buttons.append(button(github, "Github", "bi-github"))

    pub_url = data.get("published_url")
    venue = data.get("venue")

    pub_str = f'{author_str}. ({year_str}) "{title_str}."'
    if venue is not None:
        pub_str += f" <em>{venue}</em>"
    else:
        pub_str += " <em>Working Paper</em>"

    # Get citation count
    citation_count = citations_lookup.get(title_str, 0)
    citation_display = f"<span class='badge bg-secondary'>Citations: {citation_count}</span>"

    if pub_url is not None:
        buttons.append(button(pub_url, "Published", "ai-archive"))

    pub_strs[year_str].append(
        "<li class='list-group-item'>" + pub_str + "<br>" + " ".join(buttons) + f" {citation_display}</li>"
    )
```

```{python}
#| label: "all-publications-display"
#| id: "all-publications-display"
#| output: asis
for year in sorted(pub_strs.keys(), reverse=True):
    display(Markdown(f"### {year}" + "{#" + f"published-{year}" + "}"))
    display(HTML(
        "<ul class='list-group list-group-flush'>" + '\n'.join(pub_strs[year]) + "</ul>"
    ))
```

# Presentations


#### Orofacial behaviors, not eye movements, govern neural activity in mouse visual cortex

- **2026** — **Talk**, COSYNE Workshop
- **2026** — **Poster**, COSYNE
- **2025** — **Talk**, Barrels XXXVIII
- **2025** — **Poster**, Society for Neuroscience (SfN)
- **2025** — **Poster**, Janelia Mechanistic & Cognitive Neuroscience Conference (MCN)
- **2024** — **Poster**, HHMI Science Meeting

#### Facemap: a framework for modeling neural activity based on orofacial tracking

- **2026** — **Invited Workshop Talk**, [NeuroDataReHack 2025 (NWB Workshop)](https://nwb.org/events/hck26-2026-janelia-ndrh/)
- **2026** — **Software Demo**, DANDI Booth, Open Neurodata & Tools Showcase
- **2025** — **Invited Workshop Talk**, [NeuroDataReHack 2025 (NWB Workshop)](https://nwb.org/news/neurodatarehack-2025-videos-announcement/)
- **2023** — **Poster**, Society for Neuroscience (SfN)
- **2022** — **Talk**, COSYNE
- **2022** — **Talk**, Barrels XXXV
- **2022** — **Poster**, Society for Neuroscience (SfN)

#### Neuronal growth patterns and synapse formation are mediated by distinct activity-dependent mechanisms

- **2019** — **Talk**, Hotchkiss Brain Institute Research Symposium, University of Calgary
- **2019** — **Poster**, Alberta Children's Hospital Undergraduate Research Symposium, University of Calgary
